reviews.review_title: Yo this game is PEAK bruh 🤣🤣
reviews.review_description: When I played this game, I got a bone tingling sensation due to the fact that it spawned me in a black and white area. I could already feel the aura emanating from this spectacular scene. After this, I loaded into forest and my eyes were mesmerized by the juxtaposition of the chaotic forest and the calm sea. Overall, this game is absolutely splendid, I highly recommend this masterpiece of a primate game 😂✌️

reviews.review_title: very good overall, but missing stuff
reviews.review_description: this game is overall a very good and well created game, and im very impressed by everything this game has to offer. this game has great potential to be one of the best gorilla tag horror/copy type of games to ever exist. somethings that need improving though, is the water physics for one. its very janky and hard to escape once your inside it. it also has very few maps and also server sided cosmetics do not work. i love the overall style of this game, and it was very fun to explore, i just fear that after a while, it will get a bit boring not having a particular objective or goal when playing. i think some tasks should be added as a good addon to make the games interest for players last longer, and have longer playtimes for everyone. i also like the idea and gameplay of emerald rush, although its a bit buggy. this game is overall a 3.75 out of 5 and i highly recommend everyone to try this out, and i hope this game can continue for a long time and gain popularity. i would love to see more maps and features in the future as well. very good game!

the game is really well made, custom Assets, New Gamemodes and Crazy Maps, the Emerald Rush Gamemode is really well made, there are a few bugs here and there but the Base Game is Really fun! A must have for any Gtag Copy Player
w game roasty! pretty much 1 of the best normal gtag copies i've seen, keep it up!
